2026-04-07T20:36:17.7951562Z ##[group]Run find "${RUNNER_TEMP}/gh-aw/safe-jobs/" -type f -print
2026-04-07T20:36:17.7952126Z [36;1mfind "${RUNNER_TEMP}/gh-aw/safe-jobs/" -type f -print[0m
2026-04-07T20:36:17.7953066Z [36;1mecho "GH_AW_AGENT_OUTPUT=${RUNNER_TEMP}/gh-aw/safe-jobs/agent_output.json" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"[0m

2026-04-07T20:36:17.8058200Z /home/runner/work/_temp/gh-aw/safe-jobs/agent_output.json
2026-04-07T20:36:17.8058998Z /home/runner/work/_temp/gh-aw/safe-jobs/mcp-logs/github.log

2026-04-07T20:36:17.8059952Z /home/runner/work/_temp/gh-aw/safe-jobs/mcp-logs/safeoutputs.log
2026-04-07T20:36:17.8060353Z /home/runner/work/_temp/gh-aw/safe-jobs/mcp-logs/stderr.log
2026-04-07T20:36:17.8060778Z /home/runner/work/_temp/gh-aw/safe-jobs/mcp-logs/rpc-messages.jsonl
2026-04-07T20:36:17.8061231Z /home/runner/work/_temp/gh-aw/safe-jobs/mcp-logs/gateway.md
2026-04-07T20:36:17.8062136Z /home/runner/work/_temp/gh-aw/safe-jobs/mcp-logs/safeoutputs/server.log
2026-04-07T20:36:17.8062920Z /home/runner/work/_temp/gh-aw/safe-jobs/mcp-logs/mcp-gateway.log
2026-04-07T20:36:17.8063485Z /home/runner/work/_temp/gh-aw/safe-jobs/mcp-logs/start-gateway.log
2026-04-07T20:36:17.8064124Z /home/runner/work/_temp/gh-aw/safe-jobs/safeoutputs.jsonl
2026-04-07T20:36:17.8064537Z /home/runner/work/_temp/gh-aw/safe-jobs/github_rate_limits.jsonl
2026-04-07T20:36:17.8064936Z /home/runner/work/_temp/gh-aw/safe-jobs/agent-stdio.log
2026-04-07T20:36:17.8065392Z /home/runner/work/_temp/gh-aw/safe-jobs/sandbox/agent/logs/process-1775593963539-148.log
2026-04-07T20:36:17.8065873Z /home/runner/work/_temp/gh-aw/safe-jobs/aw-prompts/prompt.txt
2026-04-07T20:36:17.8066251Z /home/runner/work/_temp/gh-aw/safe-jobs/agent_usage.json
2026-04-07T20:36:17.8173419Z ##[group]Run actions/github-script@ed597411d8f924073f98dfc5c65a23a2325f34cd
2026-04-07T20:36:17.8174064Z with:
2026-04-07T20:36:17.8183730Z   script: const fs = require('fs');
const outputFile = process.env.GH_AW_AGENT_OUTPUT;

function resolveIssueNumber() {
  if (Number.isInteger(context.issue?.number) && context.issue.number > 0) {
    return context.issue.number;
  }
  const parsed = parseInt(process.env.DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER, 10);
  if (Number.isInteger(parsed) && parsed > 0) {
    return parsed;
  }
  return null;
}

const issueNumber = resolveIssueNumber();
const owner = context.repo.owner;
const repo = context.repo.repo;

if (issueNumber === null) {
  core.setFailed(`Unable to determine a valid issue number. context.issue.number=${context.issue?.number ?? 'undefined'}, DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER=${process.env.DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER ?? 'undefined'}`);
  return;
}

async function failSafe(reason) {
  core.error(`mention_owners failed: ${reason}`);
  try {
    await github.rest.issues.addLabels({
      owner, repo, issue_number: issueNumber,
      labels: ['needs-team-triage']
    });
    await github.rest.issues.createComment({
      owner, repo, issue_number: issueNumber,
      body: '⚠️ Automated triage was unable to complete owner notification for this issue. Routing for manual triage'
    });
  } catch (recoveryError) {
    core.error(`Recovery also failed: ${recoveryError.message}`);
  }
  core.setFailed(reason);
}

if (!outputFile) {
  await failSafe('No agent output path provided');
  return;
}
if (!fs.existsSync(outputFile)) {
  await failSafe(`Agent output file not found: ${outputFile}`);
  return;
}

let agentOutput;
try {
  agentOutput = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(outputFile, 'utf8'));
} catch (parseError) {
  await failSafe(`Failed to parse agent output: ${parseError.message}`);
  return;
}

if (!agentOutput || !Array.isArray(agentOutput.items)) {
  await failSafe('Agent output missing items array');
  return;
}

const items = agentOutput.items.filter(i => i.type === 'mention_owners');
if (items.length === 0) {
  await failSafe('No mention_owners items in agent output');
  return;
}

for (const item of items) {
  if (!item.owners || typeof item.owners !== 'string' || !item.owners.trim()) {
    await failSafe('mention_owners item missing owners field');
    return;
  }

  const mentions = item.owners
    .split(/[\s,]+/)
    .map(s => s.trim())
    .filter(Boolean)
    .map(raw => {
      const normalized = raw.replace(/^\\?@/, '');
      if (/\r|\n/.test(normalized)) return null;
      if (!/^[A-Za-z0-9-]+(?:\/[A-Za-z0-9-]+)?$/.test(normalized)) return null;
      return `@${normalized}`;
    })
    .filter(Boolean);

  if (mentions.length === 0) {
    await failSafe('No valid owners after parsing owners field');
    return;
  }

  const body = item.message
    ? `${item.message}\n\n//cc: ${mentions.join(' ')}`
    : mentions.join(' ');

  try {
    await github.rest.issues.createComment({
      owner, repo, issue_number: issueNumber,
      body
    });
    core.info(`Posted routing comment on #${issueNumber} mentioning: ${mentions.join(', ')}`);
  } catch (apiError) {
    await failSafe(`GitHub API error posting comment: ${apiError.message}`);
    return;
  }
}

2026-04-07T20:36:17.8194398Z   github-token: ***
2026-04-07T20:36:17.8194593Z   debug: false
2026-04-07T20:36:17.8194802Z   user-agent: actions/github-script
2026-04-07T20:36:17.8195059Z   result-encoding: json
2026-04-07T20:36:17.8195255Z   retries: 0
2026-04-07T20:36:17.8195540Z   retry-exempt-status-codes: 400,401,403,404,422
2026-04-07T20:36:17.8195815Z env:
2026-04-07T20:36:17.8195991Z   DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER: 57883
2026-04-07T20:36:17.8196333Z   GH_AW_AGENT_OUTPUT: /home/runner/work/_temp/gh-aw/safe-jobs/agent_output.json
2026-04-07T20:36:17.8196705Z ##[endgroup]
2026-04-07T20:36:18.6775837Z Posted routing comment on #57883 mentioning: @ankitbko, @RaviPidaparthi
2026-04-07T20:36:18.7124706Z Cleaning up orphan processes
